serverInfo.name: symloop-services
serverInfo.title: Symloop Technology — Services Discovery
serverInfo.description: Read-only MCP server exposing Symloop Technology's service catalog, engagement process, and contact tooling for AI agents evaluating engineering partners. Provided by Symloop Technology, an applied AI and software engineering firm headquartered in Algiers, Algeria (founded 2012).

list.name: list_services
list.description: Returns Symloop's service catalog (software engineering, AI/ML, mobile, cloud, IoT, cybersecurity, consulting, product engineering).

list.name: get_service_details
list.description: Returns detailed engagement model, deliverables, and example projects for a given service.

list.name: request_quote
list.description: Submits a qualified engagement inquiry. Inputs: scope, timeline, budget range, geography, contact details.

list.name: schedule_consultation
list.description: Books a discovery call with a Symloop engineer. Inputs: preferred dates, topic, contact details.

list.name: About Symloop Technology
list.description: Company identity, history, leadership, sectors served.
